controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'Rural Co-operative Banks (RCBs)' shall mean State Co-operative
Banks and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture
and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'microfinance loan' shall have the same meaning as assigned in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Microfinance loan' shall have the same meaning as assigned in Reserve Bank of
India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'microfinance loan' shall have the same meaning as assigned in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act,1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory modi
controls.control_description:
(3) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act,1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory modi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be seen to be usurious and can neither be sustainable nor conforming to normal banking practice
controls.control_description:
Though interest rates have been deregulated, rates of interest beyond a certain
level may be seen to be usurious and can neither be sustainable nor conforming to
normal banking practice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be seen to be usurious and can neither be sustainable nor conforming to normal banking practice

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine its lending rates taking into account its cost of funds, transaction cost, etc., with the approval of its board of directors or any other committee of the board to whom the powers have been delegated by the board
controls.control_description:
A bank shall determine its lending rates taking into account
its cost of funds, transaction cost, etc., with the approval of its Board of Directors or
any other committee of the Board to whom the powers have been delegated by the
Board, subject to adherence of transparency and shall charge interest on advances
on the terms and conditions specified in these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine its lending rates taking into account its cost of funds, transaction cost, etc., with the approval of its board of directors or any other committee of the board to whom the powers have been delegated by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the interest rates charged are transparent and known to all the customers
controls.control_description:
It should be ensured that the interest rates charged are transparent and known to
all the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the interest rates charged are transparent and known to all the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, publish the minimum and maximum interest rates charged by it, and display this information in every branch
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, therefore, publish the minimum and maximum interest
rates charged by it, and display this information in every branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, publish the minimum and maximum interest rates charged by it, and display this information in every branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged on all advances at monthly rests
controls.control_description: Interest shall be charged on all advances at monthly rests.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged on all advances at monthly rests

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to advances for agriculture and activities allied to agriculture and a bank shall follow the existing practice of charging / compounding
controls.control_description:
Provided that instructions on charging interest at monthly rests shall not be applicable
to advances for agriculture and activities allied to agriculture and a bank shall follow
the existing practice of charging / compounding of interest on agricultural advances
linked to crop seasons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to advances for agriculture and activities allied to agriculture and a bank shall follow the existing practice of charging / compounding

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account, inter-alia, the following broad guidelines: (1) an appropriate prior-approval process should be prescribed for sanctioning such loa
controls.control_description:
In laying down principles and procedures for determining lending rates by a bank in
respect of small value loans, particularly, personal loans and such other loans of
similar nature, it may take into account, inter-alia, the following broad guidelines:
(1) An appropriate prior-approval process should be prescribed for sanctioning such
loans, which should take into account, among others, the cash flows of the prospective
borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take into account, inter-alia, the following broad guidelines: (1) an appropriate prior-approval process should be prescribed for sanctioning such loa

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate risk premium as considered reasonable and justified having regard to the internal rating of the borrower
controls.control_description:
(2) Interest rates charged by a bank, inter-alia, should incorporate risk premium as
considered reasonable and justified having regard to the internal rating of the
borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate risk premium as considered reasonable and justified having regard to the internal rating of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account
controls.control_description:
Further, in considering the question of risk, the presence or absence of
security and the value thereof should be taken into account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be justifiable having regard to the total cost incurred by the bank in extending the loan, which is sought to be defrayed and the extent of return tha
controls.control_description:
(3) The total cost to the borrower, including interest and all other charges levied on a
loan, should be justifiable having regard to the total cost incurred by the bank in
extending the loan, which is sought to be defrayed and the extent of return that could
be reasonably expected from the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be justifiable having regard to the total cost incurred by the bank in extending the loan, which is sought to be defrayed and the extent of return tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed on the interest, including processing and other charges that could be levied on such loans, which may be suitably publicised
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) An appropriate ceiling may be fixed on the interest, including processing and other
charges that could be levied on such loans, which may be suitably publicised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed on the interest, including processing and other charges that could be levied on such loans, which may be suitably publicised

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy regarding pricing of microfinance loans which shall, inter alia, cover the following: (1) a well-documented inter
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a Board-approved policy regarding pricing of microfinance
loans which shall, inter alia, cover the following:
(1) A well-documented interest rate model / approach for arriving at the all-inclusive
interest rate.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy regarding pricing of microfinance loans which shall, inter alia, cover the following: (1) a well-documented inter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be usurious
controls.control_description:
Interest rates and other charges / fees on microfinance loans should not be
usurious.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be usurious

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to supervisory scrutiny by the reserve bank
controls.control_description: These shall be subjected to supervisory scrutiny by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to supervisory scrutiny by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines
repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
